subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The brilliant ode was perused, amended to some extent and dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان قصیده غراء ملاحظه گردید فی الجمله تصلیح و تعدیل شد و ارسال شد
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
